nasb.text: But as many as received Him, to them He gave the right to become children of God, even to those who believe in His name,

esv.text: But to all who did receive him, who believed in his name, he gave the right to become children of God,

cnv.text: 凡接受他的，就是信他名的人，他就賜給他們權利，成為　神的兒女。

ccb.text: 但所有接纳祂的，就是那些信祂的人，祂就赐给他们权利成为上帝的儿女。

csbs.text: 但是所有接受他的， 就是信他名的人， 他就赐给他们权柄成为神的儿女。
